answers: Web dev roadmap: HTML/CSS/JS (frontend basics), then React or Vue (framework), then Node.js or Python (backend), then databases (MongoDB/PostgreSQL).
Frontend = what users see (HTML, CSS, JS, React). Backend = server logic (Node.js, Python, databases). Full-stack = both. Start with frontend!
Become a web developer: build 5 projects (portfolio, todo app, weather app, blog, e-commerce). Deploy them. That's your resume.
Best free resources: freeCodeCamp, The Odin Project, MDN Web Docs, and YouTube. You don't need a bootcamp or degree - just build and learn!
